years_with_crohns.evidence: diagnosed with Crohn's six years ago

treatment_journey.name: mesalamine
treatment_journey.evidence: Started mesalamine while breastfeeding. Limited options. Wasn't enough. Weaned baby early to start stronger meds.

treatment_journey.name: azathioprine
treatment_journey.evidence: Added azathioprine. Helped for about a year. Then joint pain started.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: Started Humira two years ago. Helps both conditions moderately.

referral_pathway.name: GI
referral_pathway.evidence: Finally got to GI. Colonoscopy showed Crohn's throughout colon.
